caching: Redis for session management, rate limiting, and function generation cache
pattern: REST API with PostgreSQL and Redis
security: HTTPS required, CORS configured, input validation, SQL injection prevention
framework: Node.js with Express.js or Python with FastAPI
fileStorage: S3-compatible storage for bulk exports and backups
scalability: Horizontal scaling ready with stateless API design
recommendations: Use connection pooling for database connections
Use database migrations for schema changes
Implement proper backup and recovery procedures
Add monitoring and alerting for critical paths
